description:
Clean the working branch of old architecture artifacts so future work does not accidentally revive them.

**Scope**
- Remove or quarantine old `infra/` and `workers/` content if it is from the superseded RDS/App Runner/ECS/Redis direction.
- Preserve any useful tests, webhook verification helpers, or fixtures by moving them into the new serverless structure before deletion.
- Document anything intentionally kept and why.

**Acceptance**
- No live project path implies RDS/Postgres, Redis, ECS worker, App Runner, Persona/KYC, Datadog, or raw webhook payload archives are launch requirements.
- Useful verification logic or fixtures from the old branch are either migrated or explicitly deferred.
- Stale-term scan is clean except for historical docs marked superseded.
title: Remove superseded infra/worker artifacts from reset branch
